name: watch-pr
description: Watch a PR for bot review rounds and drive each round to resolution until a clean round.

interface.shortDescription: Drive GitHub bot review rounds to a clean pass.
interface.longDescription: Watch PR packages a Codex workflow for GitHub bot review loops: wait for the head-commit review, verify findings, fix or reject them with rationale, push, reply, resolve bot threads, and repeat until the latest review is clean.
defaultPrompt: Use watch-pr to handle bot review comments on this PR.
Watch this PR until the Codex bot review is clean.
